name: Savory Turkey Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease an 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2 inch loaf pan.
3. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients thoroughly. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Press the mixture firmly into the prepared loaf pan.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for about 1 1/4 hours, or until the turkey is no longer pink and the mixture is firm.
6. Allow the loaf to stand for 10 minutes before serving.
7. Top each serving with ketchup if desired. The recipe can be doubled and baked in a wax paper-lined 6 cup ring mold for about 1 1/4 hours.
